headline: Transcript: Political Fix Live — Labour’s year in review
summary: George Parker talks to Anna Gross, Stephen Bush and Chris Giles
body_text:
This is an audio transcript of the Political Fix podcast episode: ‘Political Fix Live — Labour’s year in review’

The political podcast awards are returning in January with me, Gyles Brandreth and public voting is now open for the People’s Choice Award. If you’d like Political Fix to win the People’s Choice Award, cast your vote now. The People’s Choice Awards sponsored by YouTube.

[MUSIC PLAYING]

George ParkerWelcome to Political Fix with me, George Parker. 2025 is almost wrapped up and I think we all need a break after an exhausting year in British politics. Not another one, as they say. In this special live episode of the podcast recording on Wednesday, just after Prime Minister’s Questions, we’re bringing you some thoughts on where we think things stand for Sir Keir Starmer’s Labour government, and the reset of the Westminster scene after a turbulent year.

It’s not exactly been smooth sailing, at least at home. When the prime minister entered Downing Street in July 2024, he prom
